zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise St Amand於1252年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾格倫登 安德伍德時，她的父親Amauri de St. Amand17歲，母親Isabel de Pantulf19歲。她於大約1270年與Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1287年在英國薩默塞特伯頓享年35歲，埋葬在英國波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise St Amand于1252年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾格倫登 安德伍德时，她的父亲Amauri de St. Amand17岁，母亲Isabel de Pantulf19岁。她于大约1270年与Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1287年在英国薩默塞特伯頓享年35岁，埋葬在英国波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Amand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Walloon, and in some cases possibly also English (of Norman origin), Dutch, or Flemish: from the Old French personal name Amand, Amant, Latin amandus ‘suitable to be loved’, the name of a 5th-century bishop of Bordeaux and several other Christian saints. In England it was also used as a female personal name.

variants.name: Ament
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Amand  .
Hungarian (Áment): probably of German origin (see 2 above). The surname Ament, presumably of Hungarian origin, is also found in Croatia.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise St Amand was born in 1252, in Grendon Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Amauri de St. Amand, was 17 and her mother, Isabel de Pantulf, was 19. She married Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu about 1270, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1287, in Burton, Somerset, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise St Amand est née en 1252, à Grendon Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Amauri de St. Amand, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Pantulf, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu environ 1270, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1287, à Burton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise St Amand 1252 in Grendon Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amauri de St. Amand 17 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Pantulf 19. Sie hat um 1270 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1287 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Burton, Somerset, England und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise St Amand è nata il nel 1252 nel Grendon Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Amauri de St. Amand, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Pantulf, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu circa 1270, nel Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1287, nel Burton, Somerset, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Bisham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise St Amandが1252年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレンドン ウンデルウッドで生まれた時，父Amauri de St. Amandは17歳，母Isabel de Pantulfは19歳であった。約1270年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーでSimon de Montagu 1st Baron Montaguと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1287年にイギリスソメルセトブルトンで35歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise St Amand(이)가 1252년 영국 벅잉함실르 그렌던 운더우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amauri de St. Amand(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Pantulf(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1270년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 영국 서머세트 버턴에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise St Amand nasceu em 1252, em Grendon Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Amauri de St. Amand, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Pantulf, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu aproximadamente 1270, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1287, em Burton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, England: Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise St Amand родилась в 1252 г. в местности грендон ундирвуд, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Amauri de St. Amand было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Pantulf, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu около 1270 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1287 г. в местности буртон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu aproximadamente 1270, en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1287, en Burton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
